/maps/projects/fernandezguerra/apps/opt/conda/envs/bioinfo/bin/x86_64-conda-linux-gnu-c++ -fvisibility-inlines-hidden -fmessage-length=0 -march=nocona -mtune=haswell -ftree-vectorize -fPIC -fstack-protector-strong -fno-plt -O2 -ffunction-sections -pipe -isystem /maps/projects/fernandezguerra/apps/opt/conda/envs/bioinfo/include -O3 -DNDEBUG -Wl,-O2 -Wl,--sort-common -Wl,--as-needed -Wl,-z,relro -Wl,-z,now -Wl,--disable-new-dtags -Wl,--gc-sections -Wl,--allow-shlib-undefined -Wl,-rpath,/maps/projects/fernandezguerra/apps/opt/conda/envs/bioinfo/lib -Wl,-rpath-link,/maps/projects/fernandezguerra/apps/opt/conda/envs/bioinfo/lib -L/maps/projects/fernandezguerra/apps/opt/conda/envs/bioinfo/lib CMakeFiles/lhi.dir/src/main.cpp.o -o lhi  /maps/projects/fernandezguerra/apps/opt/conda/envs/bioinfo/lib/libzstd.so.1.5.7 -pthread
